segments.text: He's locking him down and breaking him apart piece by piece with those smashes! This is—
segments.original_text: 追い詰めてスマッシュホールドでどんどん壊してますね これは

segments.text: Whoa! That smash! You cannot afford to drop your guard for even one second!
segments.original_text: うわぁースマッシュ お前一瞬でも気を抜くなとそう

full_text: He's locking him down and breaking him apart piece by piece with those smashes! This is— Whoa! That smash! You cannot afford to drop your guard for even one second!

corrections.original: 追い詰めてスマッシュホットリングでどんどん壊してますね これは
corrections.corrected: 追い詰めてスマッシュホールドでどんどん壊してますね これは
